scripts.setup: WORKSPACE_PATH="$(pwd)" && npm install && echo '✅ Dependencies installed' && if [ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" ]; then cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" $WORKSPACE_PATH/.env.local && echo '✅ .env.local copied from main repo'; else echo '⚠️  .env.local not found in main repo'; fi
